scope: Verify Phase 4 output-path restructuring implementation only.
summary: New path helpers exist in `src/features/event-tracker/paths.ts` and shared effective-path entries exist in `src/shared/paths.ts`.
`src/features/event-tracker/consolidated-writer.ts` now writes new files under `journey-events/` and still resolves legacy root session files.
`src/features/session-journal/error-log-writer.ts` exists with targeted test coverage, but it hardcodes the error-log path instead of using shared path authority.
The packet's no-handler-modification constraint is violated because `src/hooks/event-handler.ts` is modified with new session event handling branches.
Targeted tests, typecheck, and build pass; repo-wide `npm test` still fails due to pre-existing hook boundary violations and `npm run lint` is unavailable.

repo_wide_issues.npm_test: fails existing hook boundary checks unrelated to Phase 4 functionality
